programmes.show_description: Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!
Hip hip hooray, it's our 4th Birthday! Celebrate with 60 minutes of exclusive offers, packed with must-have goodies and special treats you won't want to miss.
Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!
Sharon's on the guest list! She's joining our birthday celebrations with her luxury planner. Featuring the Portobello binder, alongside a range of custom inserts and accessories.

Celebrating International Women's Day by bringing you some stunning designs from some very famous female designers.
...Quilt Kit: Katharine Wright demonstrates a brand new quilt kit - Henry Glass Charming Corners.

programmes.show_name: EPP Floral Bed Runner and Paper...
programmes.show_description: ...& Templates: Louisa Goult will be back bringing us a brand new EPP Floral Bed Runner kit, along with new Paper & Acrylic templates.

programmes.show_name: Piece And Quilt As You Go Book
programmes.show_description: Katharine Wright demonstrates the Piece And Quilt As You Go Book by Debi Schmitz Noriega.
Don't miss these limited-stock pre-cut fabric packs, ready to sew straight away. Perfect for quick quilts, patchwork and creative projects - once they're gone, they're gone!
Sunday kicks off with a brand-new launch: the latest Delightful Die-Cut Pads! These handy A5 pads are brimming with beautiful foiled and die-cut elements.
Take cardmaking to new heights with the Wonderful Wreaths Decoupage Topper Collection. Build your own beautiful decoupage centrepieces and bring the artwork to life. Back in stock!
With the largest range of craft brands around, HobbyMaker is excited to introduce the newest member of our creative family!
Signed, Sealed, Delivered! Discover everyday cardmaking essentials, including Trim Me! Stickables, Envelope Making Papers, Premier Craft Tools Envelope Making, and more.
Lauren is here with a launch from the UK's leading supplier of arts & crafts books. These practical books delight and instruct artists and crafters of all skill levels worldwide.
With the largest range of craft brands around, HobbyMaker is excited to introduce the newest member of our creative family!
Start your charm collection with this elegant bracelet! Designed to showcase your passion for crafting, it's the perfect base for our beautiful crafting-themed clip-on charms.

Debbie Shore shows us three brand new fabric collections, all featuring a beautiful panel.
...Pattern: Wendy Ross-Constance joins us to demonstrate the Olive Dress & Top Pattern by Megan Nielsen.
Welcoming Pete Hughes to Sewing Street - he will be using Sizzix tools to create beautiful buttons!
...Stevie Patterns: Wendy Ross-Constance demonstrates two Tilly and the Buttons patterns - Nell & Stevie.
...Winter Shawl: Sam Sabido will be bringing us the brand new Daisy Bloom Jacket, in beautiful colourways - perfect for Spring! And bringing back the Shades of winter Shawl.
The new and exclusive Print & Pattern Tool, created with Catherine Pooler, makes pattern play simple and fun! This dual tool makes creating repeat patterns easier than ever.
It's time for a brand-new designer launch! Tune in for fabulous demos and amazing deals. Get ready for a crafty hour packed with new stamps, dies, stencils, washi tape, and more.
